prose:
Frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO) for TEMPO — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet).
Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`; no re-optimization — this is a single-point frontier-orbital analysis (`DFT//input geometry`).
SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings were reported by the engine.
Result: HOMO = –6.3375439 eV, LUMO = –2.4651235 eV → HOMO–LUMO gap = **3.872420320420745 eV**.
The calculation was run with the chemkit `frontier-orbitals` skill; the live engine log streamed to `frontier_$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).out` in the working directory (accessible for inspection), and the structured result was written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4l8qfx6k/live.json`.
